about.body: Verma Realty is a local business built on quality work and word-of-mouth. We keep it simple: show up on time, do it properly, charge fairly. Most of our customers come back — and bring their friends.

items.name: R. Sharma
items.quote: Professional from start to finish. Exactly what was promised, when it was promised.

items.name: A. Fernandes
items.quote: Fair price, quality work. Already recommended them twice.

items.name: Home Buying Help
features: From shortlist to keys, one point of contact.

items.name: Site Visits
features: Scheduled visits that respect your time.

items.q: How do I schedule a property viewing?
items.a: Message or call — we confirm slots the same day when possible.

items.q: Do you help with home loans and documentation?
items.a: We connect you with partner banks and guide paperwork end to end.

items.q: Which neighbourhoods do you specialise in?
items.a: We focus on local pockets we know block by block.
